content:
4 min read
Just now

--

Cooking and cryptocurrency have more in common than people think. Both require the right ingredients, precise timing, and enough experimentation to avoid ending up completely cooked.
The market still knows how to butcher emotions faster than a chef breaking down a fresh venison loin. In the kitchen it’s all about balancing heat, texture, and flavor!
Back in February 2021 I published a weird combo, covering NFT news and the chicken curry I cooked for dinner! It was rather catchy and continued with this mix for a while!
Crypto cooking lives forever, so even if I vanish in the void or not… my articles will live on the web forever! You know what they say… when life gives you lemons… make lemonade!
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Crypto made a hostile takeover and the cooking twist went underground for a while! In 2026 I resurrected the series and added the new recipes at the bottom of each new article!
However, this created a bulky signature so wrapping up chapter one of this Web3 powered cooking almanac with 20 recipes for crypto bros! I hope you like a mixed platter!
Crypto Cooking — Chapter 1 Almanac Of Web3-Powered Recipes
Now is time to start fresh and delight people with summer vibes! What if life gives you strawberries? What if it gives you mint…
